title: jasminum multinervosum
intro: Jasminum multinervosum, also known as the many-nerved jasmine, is a flowering plant species in the genus Jasminum, native to India and Southeast Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and treat various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and sore throat. The health benefits of Jasminum multinervosum include its antioxidant and antibacterial properties, which can help protect against diseases and promote overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
